tests.name: current status is honest
tests.expected: Start Here marks three-minute timing and overall pass as false until evidence packet and rehearsals are complete.

tests.name: presenter path is ordered
tests.expected: Presenter opens go/no-go, evidence packet, command card, full script, and Q&A in that order.

tests.name: integration path is evidence-bound
tests.expected: Integration owner opens request, evidence binding, claim ledger, sponsor truth table, and click map before assigning LIVE badges.

tests.name: reviewer path includes all specs
tests.expected: Reviewer path points to results and all pitch-spec acceptance JSON files.

tests.name: hard rules preserve SPEC_ONLY scope
tests.expected: Start Here restates no UI, no runtime edits, no daemon/npm/tsx/node src/*, no unsupported CLI, readiness, extension, generated CI, or legal-advice claims.
